mapper.select: SELECT i.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, opt.opt_grp_nm AS opt_id_nm, ite.opt_nm AS parent_opt_item_nm, cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt opt ON opt.opt_id = i.opt_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item ite ON ite.opt_item_id = i.parent_opt_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = i.opt_type_cd WHERE i.opt_item_id = #{id}
